chunks.text: Technical Reports - Ronald S. Fearing. Evolving Robotic Leg Shapes via Deep Reinforcement Learning (EECS-2020-103) Hayden Sheung. Design of a Two-Wheeled Mars Rover with Sprawl Ability and Metal Brush Traction (EECS-2019-145) Ivan Davydychev. Thin-Film Electrostatic Actuators and Adhesives for High-Voltage Robotics (EECS-2018-58) Ethan Schaler.
chunks.question: What are the titles of the technical reports from 2018 to 2020?
chunks.answer: Robotic leg shapes, Mars rover, electrostatic actuators.

chunks.text: Collaborative, Contact-based Schemas for Robot Righting utilizing Hull Shape Design (EECS-2017-206) David McPherson. Force Sensing Shell using a Planar Sensor for Miniature Legged Robots (EECS-2016-26) Joshua D. Goldberg and Ronald S. Fearing. Tactile Sensors for Palm-Size Crawling Robots (EECS-2014-40) Jaakko Karras.
chunks.question: What topics are covered in the 2014 to 2017 reports?
chunks.answer: Robot righting, force sensing, tactile sensors.

chunks.text: Flight Simulation of an Ornithopter (EECS-2013-60) Cameron Rose and Ronald S. Fearing. Reinforcement Learning Methods to Enable Automatic Tuning of Legged Robots (EECS-2012-145) Mallory Tayson-Frederick. Reinforcement Learning Methods to Enable Automatic Tuning of Legged Robots (EECS-2012-129) Nicolas Zeitlin.
chunks.question: What are the main subjects of the 2012 and 2013 reports?

chunks.text: Optical Flow on a Flapping Wing Robot (EECS-2010-96) Fernando Garcia Bermudez. Running with Flapping Wings (EECS-2010-76) Kevin Peterson. Flight Simulation of a 3 gram Autonomous Glider (EECS-2006-80) Jon Perry Entwistle and Ronald S. Fearing.
chunks.question: What are the 2006 and 2010 reports about?
chunks.answer: Flapping wing robots and autonomous glider.

chunks.text: The Dynamic Response of a Tactile Sensor (M89/138) E.M. Sladek and Ronald S. Fearing. Determining the Axis of a Surface of Revolution Using Tactile Sensing (M89/117) M. Berkemeier and Ronald S. Fearing.
chunks.question: What do the 1989 reports focus on?
chunks.answer: Tactile sensing and surface axis determination.
